component.name: Qwen Desktop
component.summary: Powerful AI assistant with MCP support

description.p: Qwen Desktop brings the full power of Qwen AI to your Linux desktop with native Model Context Protocol (MCP) support. Chat with AI, use tools like Filesystem and Sequential Thinking, and automate your workflow securely.

ul.li: Full MCP Support: Filesystem, Browser, and Custom Tools
Native Linux: AppImage, .deb, .rpm, and Flatpak support
Auto-updates: Always stay on the latest version

description.p: Initial release of Qwen Desktop for Linux
